message:
Add deletion vectors support and UI improvements

- Parse deletion_file field in manifest fragments
- Load Arrow IPC and Roaring Bitmap deletion files
- Track logical vs physical row counts (excluding deleted)
- Add isRowDeleted() method for row-level deletion checks
- Update GitHub link to teamchong/lanceql
- Fix DataFrame limit field - empty means no limit (up to 10k)
- Filter dropdown now excludes string/vector columns (numeric only)
